title: Assistant Store Manager - Metro Shoes - 2025 Hiring Drive

jsonLd.title: Assistant Store Manager - Metro Shoes - 2025 Hiring Drive
jsonLd.description:
Grow your career with Metro Shoes! We are hiring a Assistant Store Manager for our Dhanbad team. Be part of a workplace that celebrates innovation, diversity, and performance.

About Metro Shoes:
Metro Shoes is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Handle customer queries, complaints, and escalations effectively
• Implement promotional activities and in-store campaigns
• Assist in recruiting, onboarding, and performance management of staff
• Ensure visual merchandising standards are maintained at all times
• Coordinate with the supply chain team for timely stock delivery
• Achieve sales targets and improve store performance metrics
• Build relationships with regular customers to drive loyalty

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Arch / M.Arch from recognized institution
• 6-10 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Retail Analytics
• Proficiency in Omnichannel Retail
• Proficiency in Retail Operations
• Proficiency in Sales Techniques
• Proficiency in Planogram
• Proficiency in Loss Prevention
• Proficiency in Category Management
• Proficiency in MS Excel

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Flexible working hours
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Salary Range: 12 LPA - 25 LPA per annum

Location: Dhanbad, Jharkhand, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Metro Shoes!
